recommendations.title: Raazi
recommendations.overview: An Indian spy is married to a Pakistani military officer during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

recommendations.title: Tiger Zinda Hai
recommendations.overview: When a group of Indian and Pakistani nurses are held hostage in Iraq by a terrorist organization, a renowned Indian secret agent is drawn out of hiding to rescue them.

recommendations.title: Swades
recommendations.overview: A successful Indian scientist returns home to his village to take his nanny back to America with him, and in the process rediscovers his roots.

recommendations.title: Sir
recommendations.overview: A prosperous young Indian man falls in love with his servant, a widow with the dream of becoming a fashion designer.

recommendations.title: Just a Question of Love
recommendations.overview: After his gay cousin dies from hepatitis, young Laurent, who lives with his best friend Carole, falls in love with Cedric, a plant scientist. He's afraid to inform his conservative parents that he is gay.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: My Beautiful Laundrette
recommendations.overview: A young Pakistani Briton manages a rundown laundrette with his lover while dealing with tension in his family, the local Pakistani community, and a persistent mob of skinheads.

recommendations.title: Spider in the Web
recommendations.overview: A young operative is sent on a mission to follow an older agent who's behavior has come into question.

recommendations.title: The Other End of the Line
recommendations.overview: An employee at an Indian call-center travels to San Francisco to be with a guy she falls for over the phone.

recommendations.title: Baaghi
recommendations.overview: Ronny is a rebellious man, who falls in love with Sia but circumstances separate them. Years later, Ronny learns that Sia is abducted by a martial arts champion, Raghav.
